task_completion.description: Global Logistics Contract opportunity is marked as High Priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Global Logistics Contract' opportunity card or list entry in the Odoo CRM. Verify that at least one star icon is highlighted, indicating it has been marked as High Priority.

task_completion.description: Global Logistics Contract opportunity is tagged with 'Key Account'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Global Logistics Contract' opportunity card or list entry. Verify that a tag or label reading 'Key Account' is visible on it.

task_completion.description: New HQ Furniture opportunity is marked as High Priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'New HQ Furniture' opportunity card or list entry in the Odoo CRM. Verify that at least one star icon is highlighted.

task_completion.description: New HQ Furniture opportunity is tagged with 'Key Account'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'New HQ Furniture' opportunity card or list entry. Verify that a tag or label reading 'Key Account' is visible on it.
Look for the 'Server Upgrade' opportunity card or list entry. Verify that no star icons are highlighted (priority is 0) and the 'Key Account' tag is NOT present, as its revenue is under $50,000.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web application open in a browser, with navigation through the CRM module.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to update the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing Python scripts, XML-RPC calls, or SQL queries used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The changes are visible in the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state should be shown in the standard Odoo CRM Kanban or List view, without signs of HTML manipulation via browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target opportunities: 'Global Logistics Contract' ($150,000) and 'New HQ Furniture' ($55,000) must be marked as High Priority (at least 1 star highlighted) and tagged with 'Key Account'. 'Server Upgrade' ($12,000) must remain unmodified (0 stars, no 'Key Account' tag). High priority means 1, 2, or 3 stars in Odoo CRM.
